meaning: Army Specialized Training Program (美国)陆军专业训练计划
examples: Vesicles generally existed in upper and lower phases of ASTP.
Agricultural Science and technology Park (ASTP) is a main approach to diffusion of agricultural technology innovation.
There is a minimum in the curves of phase separating time in the ASTP systems, which may be related to the nature of vesicle and the interaction of vesicles with each other.
